name: 5/3/1 - Wendler Method
programDescription: Classic 4-week strength program with main lifts at prescribed percentages and Boring But Big accessories. Designed for intermediate-advanced lifters seeking steady strength gains. 4-day split with main lift + 5x10 supplemental work + accessories.

days.name: Day 1 - Squat
days.dayDescription: Main: Back Squat, Supplemental: 5x10 BBB Squat, Accessories: Leg Press + Ab Wheel
days.dayDescriptionEs: Principal: Sentadilla con barra, Suplementario: 5x10 BBB Sentadilla, Accesorios: Prensa de piernas + Rueda abdominal

days.name: Day 2 - Bench Press
days.dayDescription: Main: Bench Press, Supplemental: 5x10 BBB Bench, Accessories: DB Rows + Tricep Extensions
days.dayDescriptionEs: Principal: Press de banca, Suplementario: 5x10 BBB Banca, Accesorios: Remo con mancuerna + Extensiones de tríceps

days.name: Day 3 - Deadlift
days.dayDescription: Main: Deadlift, Supplemental: 5x10 BBB Deadlift, Accessories: Bulgarian Split Squat + Hanging Leg Raise

exercises.notes: BBB substitute: 5x10 RDL at moderate weight
BBB substitute: 5x10 RDL at moderate weight
BBB substitute: 5x10 RDL at moderate weight

days.dayDescriptionEs: Principal: Peso muerto, Suplementario: 5x10 BBB Peso muerto, Accesorios: Sentadilla búlgara + Elevación de piernas colgado

days.name: Day 4 - Overhead Press
days.dayDescription: Main: OHP, Supplemental: 5x10 BBB OHP, Accessories: Chin-ups + Lateral Raises
days.dayDescriptionEs: Principal: Press militar, Suplementario: 5x10 BBB Press militar, Accesorios: Dominadas supinas + Elevaciones laterales

programDescriptionEs: Programa clásico de fuerza de 4 semanas con levantamientos principales a porcentajes prescritos y accesorios Boring But Big. Diseñado para levantadores intermedios-avanzados que buscan ganancias constantes de fuerza. Split de 4 días con levantamiento principal + trabajo suplementario 5x10 + accesorios.

name: PPL - Hypertrophy Focus
programDescription: 6-day Push/Pull/Legs split optimized for muscle growth. Linear progression on compounds, volume-focused accessories. Ideal for intermediate lifters in a growth phase with good recovery capacity.
expectedOutcome: 2-4kg muscle gain per month with proper nutrition
progressionScheme: Linear: +2.5kg on compounds when hitting top rep range, +1.25kg on accessories

days.name: Push A - Chest Focus
days.dayDescription: Heavy bench, incline work, overhead pressing, triceps
days.dayDescriptionEs: Press de banca pesado, trabajo inclinado, press por encima de la cabeza, tríceps

days.name: Pull A - Back Thickness
days.dayDescription: Deadlifts, rows, pulldowns, biceps
days.dayDescriptionEs: Peso muerto, remos, jalones, bíceps

days.name: Legs A - Quad Focus
days.dayDescription: Heavy squats, quad isolation, hamstrings, calves
days.dayDescriptionEs: Sentadillas pesadas, aislamiento de cuádriceps, isquiotibiales, pantorrillas

days.name: Push B - Shoulder Focus
days.dayDescription: OHP, dumbbell pressing, flyes, rear delts, triceps
days.dayDescriptionEs: Press militar, press con mancuernas, aperturas, deltoides posterior, tríceps

days.name: Pull B - Back Width
days.dayDescription: Pullups, cable rows, rear delts, biceps
days.dayDescriptionEs: Dominadas, remos en polea, deltoides posterior, bíceps

days.name: Legs B - Hamstring Focus
days.dayDescription: Front squats, RDLs, lunges, calves
days.dayDescriptionEs: Sentadilla frontal, peso muerto rumano, zancadas, pantorrillas

programDescriptionEs: Split Push/Pull/Legs de 6 días optimizado para crecimiento muscular. Progresión lineal en compuestos, accesorios enfocados en volumen. Ideal para levantadores intermedios en fase de crecimiento con buena capacidad de recuperación.

name: GZCL Method - Linear Periodization
programDescription: Evidence-based T1/T2/T3 tier structure. T1 = heavy compounds (85%+), T2 = moderate compounds (65-85%), T3 = high-rep accessories. Autoregulated rep schemes. 4-day upper/lower split.

days.name: Day 1 - Squat Focus
days.dayDescription: T1: Squat, T2: Bench, T3: Accessories

exercises.notes: T3: Max rep set, 2 min rest

days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Sentadilla, T2: Press banca, T3: Accesorios

days.name: Day 2 - Bench Focus
days.dayDescription: T1: Bench, T2: Squat, T3: Accessories

exercises.notes: T3: Max rep set per arm

days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Press banca, T2: Sentadilla, T3: Accesorios

days.name: Day 3 - Deadlift Focus
days.dayDescription: T1: Deadlift, T2: OHP, T3: Accessories
days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Peso muerto, T2: Press militar, T3: Accesorios

days.name: Day 4 - OHP Focus
days.dayDescription: T1: OHP, T2: Deadlift, T3: Accessories

exercises.notes: T3: Max rep set (assisted if needed)

days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Press militar, T2: Peso muerto, T3: Accesorios

programDescriptionEs: Estructura T1/T2/T3 basada en evidencia. T1 = compuestos pesados (85%+), T2 = compuestos moderados (65-85%), T3 = accesorios de altas repeticiones. Esquemas de repeticiones autorregulados. Split de 4 días tren superior/inferior.

name: Starting Strength - Linear Progression
programDescription: Classic beginner LP program. 3 days/week with A/B alternating workouts. Focus on the big 5 lifts with rapid progression. Ideal for novices with <1 year training experience.
expectedOutcome: Rapid strength gains: +10-20kg squat, +5-10kg bench/press per month
progressionScheme: Add 2.5kg to bench/press each session, 5kg to squat/deadlift. Reset if 3 failures.

days.name: Workout A
days.dayDescription: Squat, Press, Deadlift
days.dayDescriptionEs: Sentadilla, Press, Peso muerto

days.name: Workout B
days.dayDescription: Squat, Bench, Deadlift
days.dayDescriptionEs: Sentadilla, Press banca, Peso muerto

programDescriptionEs: Programa clásico de progresión lineal para principiantes. 3 días/semana con entrenamientos alternos A/B. Enfoque en los 5 levantamientos principales con progresión rápida. Ideal para novatos con menos de 1 año de experiencia.

name: Upper/Lower 4-Day Split
programDescription: Balanced 4-day split with 2 upper, 2 lower days. Mix of strength and hypertrophy work. Ideal for intermediate lifters who want flexibility and balanced development.
progressionScheme: Double progression: add reps until top range, then add weight and drop to bottom range

days.name: Upper Power
days.dayDescription: Heavy pressing and pulling (4-6 rep range)
days.dayDescriptionEs: Empuje y tirón pesado (rango de 4-6 repeticiones)

days.name: Lower Power
days.dayDescription: Heavy squats and deadlifts (4-6 rep range)
days.dayDescriptionEs: Sentadillas y peso muerto pesado (rango de 4-6 repeticiones)

days.name: Upper Hypertrophy
days.dayDescription: Volume pressing and pulling (8-12 rep range)
days.dayDescriptionEs: Volumen de empuje y tirón (rango de 8-12 repeticiones)

days.name: Lower Hypertrophy
days.dayDescription: Volume leg work (10-15 rep range)
days.dayDescriptionEs: Volumen de piernas (rango de 10-15 repeticiones)

programDescriptionEs: Split equilibrado de 4 días con 2 días de tren superior y 2 de inferior. Mezcla de trabajo de fuerza e hipertrofia. Ideal para levantadores intermedios que quieren flexibilidad y desarrollo equilibrado.

name: Full Body 3x - Strength & Size
programDescription: 3-day full body split with compound focus. Each session trains all major muscle groups. Ideal for intermediates with limited training days who want balanced development.
expectedOutcome: Balanced strength and hypertrophy with 3x/week frequency
progressionScheme: DUP: Heavy (4-6), Moderate (8-10), Light (12-15) rotated across exercises

days.name: Day 1 - Squat Heavy
days.dayDescription: Heavy squat, moderate bench, light deadlift variation
days.dayDescriptionEs: Sentadilla pesada, press banca moderado, variación ligera de peso muerto

days.name: Day 2 - Bench Heavy
days.dayDescription: Heavy bench, moderate deadlift, light squat variation
days.dayDescriptionEs: Press banca pesado, peso muerto moderado, variación ligera de sentadilla

days.name: Day 3 - Deadlift Heavy
days.dayDescription: Heavy deadlift, moderate squat, light bench variation
days.dayDescriptionEs: Peso muerto pesado, sentadilla moderada, variación ligera de press banca

programDescriptionEs: Split de cuerpo completo de 3 días con enfoque en compuestos. Cada sesión entrena todos los grupos musculares principales. Ideal para intermedios con días de entrenamiento limitados que quieren desarrollo equilibrado.

name: nSuns 5/3/1 LP
programDescription: High-volume 5/3/1 linear progression with 9-set T1 main lift (5/3/1+ pyramid) and 8-set T2 secondary lift. 4-day split optimized for rapid strength gains. Designed by Reddit user nSuns for intermediate lifters seeking aggressive progression.
expectedOutcome: Rapid strength gains with weekly progression on main lifts
progressionScheme: T1: 9 sets following 5/3/1+ scheme (ascending then descending). T2: 8 sets at submaximal weight. Add 5-10lbs weekly based on AMRAP performance.

days.name: Day 1 - Bench/OHP
days.dayDescription: T1: Bench Press (9 sets), T2: Overhead Press (8 sets), Accessories: Chest/Triceps
days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Press de banca (9 series), T2: Press militar (8 series), Accesorios: Pecho/Tríceps

days.name: Day 2 - Squat/Sumo DL
days.dayDescription: T1: Squat (9 sets), T2: Sumo Deadlift (8 sets), Accessories: Legs/Core
days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Sentadilla (9 series), T2: Peso muerto sumo (8 series), Accesorios: Piernas/Core

days.name: Day 3 - OHP/Incline
days.dayDescription: T1: Overhead Press (9 sets), T2: Incline Bench (8 sets), Accessories: Shoulders/Back
days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Press militar (9 series), T2: Press inclinado (8 series), Accesorios: Hombros/Espalda

days.name: Day 4 - Deadlift/Front Squat
days.dayDescription: T1: Deadlift (9 sets), T2: Front Squat (8 sets), Accessories: Back/Legs
days.dayDescriptionEs: T1: Peso muerto (9 series), T2: Sentadilla frontal (8 series), Accesorios: Espalda/Piernas

programDescriptionEs: Progresión lineal 5/3/1 de alto volumen con 9 series de levantamiento principal T1 (pirámide 5/3/1+) y 8 series de levantamiento secundario T2. Split de 4 días optimizado para ganancias rápidas de fuerza.

name: PHUL - Power Hypertrophy Upper Lower
programDescription: 4-day upper/lower split combining power (strength) and hypertrophy training. Days 1-2 focus on heavy compound lifts (3-5 reps), Days 3-4 emphasize volume and muscle building (8-12 reps). Ideal for balanced strength and size.
expectedOutcome: Balanced strength gains and muscle hypertrophy
progressionScheme: Power days: 3-5 reps at 85-90% for strength. Hypertrophy days: 8-12 reps at 65-75% for size. Progress when all sets completed with good form.

days.name: Day 1 - Upper Power
days.dayDescription: Heavy upper body compounds: bench, row, OHP. Focus on strength with 3-5 rep range.
days.dayDescriptionEs: Compuestos pesados de tren superior: press banca, remo, press militar. Enfoque en fuerza con rango de 3-5 repeticiones.

days.name: Day 2 - Lower Power
days.dayDescription: Heavy lower body compounds: squat, deadlift. Focus on strength with 3-5 rep range.
days.dayDescriptionEs: Compuestos pesados de tren inferior: sentadilla, peso muerto. Enfoque en fuerza con rango de 3-5 repeticiones.

days.name: Day 3 - Upper Hypertrophy
days.dayDescription: High-volume upper body: focus on 8-12 rep range for muscle growth. More exercises, less rest.
days.dayDescriptionEs: Alto volumen tren superior: enfoque en rango de 8-12 repeticiones para crecimiento muscular. Más ejercicios, menos descanso.

days.name: Day 4 - Lower Hypertrophy
days.dayDescription: High-volume lower body: focus on 8-15 rep range for leg size. Quad and hamstring emphasis.
days.dayDescriptionEs: Alto volumen tren inferior: enfoque en rango de 8-15 repeticiones para tamaño de piernas. Énfasis en cuádriceps e isquiotibiales.

programDescriptionEs: Split de 4 días tren superior/inferior combinando entrenamiento de potencia (fuerza) e hipertrofia. Días 1-2 enfocados en compuestos pesados (3-5 reps), Días 3-4 enfatizan volumen y construcción muscular (8-12 reps). Ideal para fuerza y tamaño equilibrados.
